#  Preview Release of Apache Flink 2.0
October 23, 2024 - Xintong Song
The Apache Flink community is actively preparing Flink 2.0, the first major release since Flink 1.0 launched 8 years ago. As a significant milestone, Flink 2.0 is set to…
